MINUTES
(403/CWW) ROGER MEREDITH FOR PET WHO APPEARED ; MARGARET PENDERGAST FOR RESP WHO APPEARED. CONSOLIDATED WITH FL032717 INTO THIS CASE. ALL FUTURE FILINGS SHALL BE UNDE
R THIS CASE. NEITHER PARTY HAS ATTENDED FCS ORIENTATION, AND THEY ARE ORDERED TO DO SO. THE PARTIES RETURNED FROM FCS MEDIATION WITHOUT A
STIPULATION. ALL TEMPORARY ORDERS REMAIN IN EFFECT. CONT. TO 5/17/99 AT 9:30A FOR HEARING. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY KENT GUBBINE CSR #5797
ATTACHMENT TO DECLARATION OF ROBERT ANDERSON
MINUTES
(403/CWW) ROGER MEREDITH FOR PET WHO APPEARED; MARGARET PENDERGAST FOR RESP WHO APPEARED. AFTER ARGUMENT, THE COURT MADE THE FOLLOWING FINDINGS AND ORDERS. PARTIES SH
ALL COOPERATE SO THAT THEY BOTH HAVE COPIES OF IMPORTANT DOCUMENTS, AND NEITHER PARTY SHALL DESTROY ANY IMPORTANT DOCUMENTS. PARTIES AGREE TO A
ALL STAY WITH RESP; YOUNGER CHILD SHALL STAY WITH PET. THE CHILDREN SHALL VISIT THE OTHER PARENT AS THEY WISH. PET SHALL MOVE INTO THE QUESEDA
O LATER THAN 5/24/99. PET MAY INSPECT BEFORE MOVING IN. RESP SHALL LIVE IN THE THOMAS ST. PROPERTY.  RESP TO MAKE QUESEDA PROPERTY "LIVABLE",
Y ENTER THOMAS PROPERTY LOWER UNIT TO CARE FOR HIS BROTHER. PARTIES SHALL COOPERATE REGARDING ANY PROPERTY THAT HAS TO BE MOVED.  LARON SHALL RECEIVE
ARTIES' I&E'S, THE COURT ORDERS RESP TO PAY PET $600/MO. TEMPORARY SS BEGINNING 5/1/99 WITH $150  CREDIT FOR MAY, HALF EACH ON THE 1ST AND 15TH, IN
AT $100/MO ON THE 1ST OF EACH MONTH, RESERVING THE ULTIMATE ISSUE OF A/F. PET  TO PREPARE THE ORDER. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY KENT GUBBINE #5797.
